breach_priority_order.rationale: Fix hard mandate breaches (unapproved holdings, sector/asset caps) before softer drift watches.

preferred_trim_method.rationale: Trim offending holdings proportionally to keep diversification, rather than liquidating one name.

replacement_preference.rationale: Redeploy sale proceeds into the broad approved S&P 500 ETF as the default safe landing.

min_trade_size.rationale: Skip trades smaller than 1% of portfolio value to avoid noisy micro-trades.

max_trades_per_portfolio.rationale: Keep remediations minimal and human-reviewable; cap proposals at 4 trades.

cash_buffer_target.rationale: Hold ~3% cash buffer above the mandate minimum for redemption flexibility.
